meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Advanced Workflow for Freelance Developers
content.seo_description: Stop drowning in AI tools. Master AI-driven debugging with this advanced checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing every new AI tool. Focus on integrating Antigravity for architectural analysis and Claude Code for iterative CLI-based debugging. By automating your diagnostic loops, you reduce cognitive load, cut deployment time by 40%, and deliver production-grade code that keeps your freelance pipeline moving at high velocity.
content.intro:
The modern freelance stack has become a graveyard of abandoned AI tools. You start the day with a clear roadmap, only to find yourself buried under a mountain of hallucinated boilerplate and fragmented context windows. The friction isn't the code; it's the lack of a cohesive, automated debugging strategy that separates the amateurs from the high-earners.

True velocity comes from mastering the loop between diagnostic analysis and autonomous execution. By leveraging Antigravity for deep-code introspection and Claude Code for terminal-native refactoring, you transform your development process from a reactive struggle into a surgical strike. This is how you reclaim your time and build software that actually scales.

steps.title: Contextualize the Failure
steps.description: Before fixing, map the dependency graph to ensure you aren't chasing ghosts. Use Antigravity to identify the root cause origin.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current file structure and identify potential circular dependencies or state management inconsistencies causing the intermittent error in [feature_name].
steps.claude_code_command: claude ls -R --ignore 'node_modules' && claude ask 'Summarize the architectural flow of the broken module.'

steps.title: Isolate the Logic
steps.description: Create a minimal reproduction case to ensure your fix doesn't introduce regressions in production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test suite that isolates the logic in [file_path] and mocks the external API dependencies.

steps.title: Automated Refactoring
steps.description: Apply the fix directly through the CLI to maintain context and ensure file-system-level changes are tracked.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified logic in [file_path] to handle edge cases where the input is null or undefined, adhering to clean code standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit [file_path] --prompt 'Apply the refactor to handle null inputs as discussed.'

steps.title: Regression Verification
steps.description: Verify the fix against the entire codebase to ensure no side effects were introduced in the downstream components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the impact of the changes in [file_path] on all importing modules. Highlight any breaking changes.

steps.title: Documentation & Delivery
steps.description: Generate a professional changelog for your client automatically to prove the value of your work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a concise technical summary of the bug, the root cause, and the permanent fix for the client's project documentation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Write a professional git commit message and a brief summary for the client regarding this fix.'

pro_tips: Always force the AI to explain the 'why' behind a fix before applying it; this prevents blind trust in hallucinated patches.
Use Claude Code's '--read' flag to explicitly include only the relevant dependency files, keeping your context window clean and accurate.
Configure Antigravity to output results in Markdown; this allows for instant copy-pasting into client reports or internal technical specs.
Treat the CLI as your primary IDE extension; avoid switching context to the browser to maintain flow state.
Build a custom 'System Prompt' library for your common architectural patterns to ensure the AI always follows your specific coding style.
content.next_steps: Integrate these CLI workflows into your CI/CD pipeline to automate the initial diagnostic phase, allowing you to wake up to pre-analyzed bug reports.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting tool fatigue slow down your growth. Implement this system today and watch your billable hours become more efficient and high-impact. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
